intent: Write a critique of 'highly-rated but community-doubted products on the electronics storefront' — the Reddit versus Star rating disagreement catalog. (1) One Stop Market shopping site — browse the electronics category and collect at least 5 products with 4.0+ star ratings. Record name, price, rating, review count. (2) Reddit — browse /f/technology AND /f/headphones for posts containing critical takes on product categories (e.g. 'don't buy Bluetooth X'). Collect at least 3 posts with title, score, comment count. The report must: (a) present each storefront pick with its star rating, (b) match each to the closest community skepticism, (c) label each product 'community-aligned', 'community-skeptical', 'unmatched' with reasoning, (d) close with two items that pass both filters. Cite every claim.
author_notes: Medium tier. Explicit star-vs-community disagreement catalog.
